title: VonShef Electric Coffee & Spice Grinder, for Espresso Beans, Nuts & Grains - Bean & Spices Chopper with Powerful Motor and Tough Stainless Steel Blades, Grind up to 60g / 4 Cup Capacity - Black 150W
features: COFFEE, NUTS & SPICES: Channel your inner barista and level up elevenses with the VonShef coffee grinder. Thanks to the stainless steel blades, you can even use it as a herb, seed, or spice grinder to finesse home cooking.
ONE BUTTON OPERATION: Using your 150W coffee been grinder couldn’t be easier – hold down the button for a fine grind, or pulse for thicker grains. Create your perfect blend using the transparent lid.

SAFETY SHUT-OFF: Family friendly in both size and safety – this 60g-capacity espresso grinder can grind up to four cups of beans at a time. Use with confidence thanks to the spillage-free safety lock.
CABLE MANAGEMENT: Finished in a matte black colourway, the electric grinder will have pride of place on your kitchen counter. When not in use, the cable system allows for sleek storage.

OUR BRAND PROMISE: Established in 2009, VonShef is the ultimate one-stop shop for at-home chefs and budding bakers. Bring any recipe into reach with our tried-and-tested quality Electric Coffee Grinder.

VonShef Coffee Grinder Merchant video Enjoy freshly ground coffee at home. VonShef 150W Coffee Grinder with Stainless Steel Blades Electric coffee grinders are a must-have in every coffee-lover's home. The VonShef espresso coffee grinder features stainless steel blades , making light work of all your coffee grinding needs. Nothing beats that authentic taste of freshly ground beans; upgrade your day-to-day coffee routine today. Enjoy freshly ground coffee at home. Black Coffee Bean Grinder for Spices, Nuts, Herbs | Multiuse Grinder for Kitchen Designed for more than just coffee, the 150W motor makes this electric herb grinder perfect for a wide range of culinary needs – spices, nuts, and herbs . Simply fill up to 60g worth of your soon-to-be-ground goods, click the safety-lock lid into place, and grind using the straightforward one-button operation . Depending on the fineness or coarseness of the grind you're after, hold the button down for as long as you need. And don't worry, the transparent lid ensures perfect results, every time. Previous page One Button Operation Transparent viewing lid for the perfect grind. Using this espresso grinder is simple; the longer you hold down the button, the finer the grind. Versatile Spice Grinder Perfect for coffee beans, herbs, spices, and nuts. Go further than your morning caffeine fix; enhance all your recipes with finely ground flavours. Powerful Grinding Featuring ultra-sharp stainless steel blades. Powered by a 150W motor, the electric coffee grinder makes quick work of creating fine grinds. Safe & Easy to Use With a safety lock lid and max capacity marking. The coffee grinder machine begins grinding only once the lid is locked, keeping your counters clean.
